title: hemerocallis disticha var. kwanso
intro: Hemerocallis disticha var. kwanso, also known as the Day Lily, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Hemerocallis disticha var. kwanso include reducing fever, soothing digestive problems, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant's medicinal properties can be utilized through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
